episodes.title: Maniac Murder Cult Leader Convicted
episodes.description:
Michail Chkhikvishvili, known as "Commander Butcher" and the leader of the international nihilistic violent extremist group Maniac Murder Cult, was sentenced to 15 years in federal prison after pleading guilty to soliciting hate crimes and distributing bomb and ricin manufacturing instructions targeting Jewish children and racial minorities in New York City. Prosecutors directly linked his manifesto, called the "Hater's Handbook," to the January 2025 Antioch High School shooting in Nashville, where the 17-year-old attacker claimed in an audio recording that he was acting on behalf of Maniac Murder Cult and named Chkhikvishvili personally. This is what a functioning radicalization pipeline looks like, and it operates entirely online, across borders, and straight into your local school.
Like, share, follow, and comment below with your thoughts. Your engagement helps this content reach more people who need to see it. Visit the link in my bio to join my free online community for hundreds of videos and resources on terrorism and radicalization.
